title: astragalus yanerwoensis
intro: Astragalus yanerwoensis, also known as the Yanerwo milkvetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Astragalus yanerwoensis include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Astragalus yanerwoensis typically involve drying the roots and stems, which are then used in teas, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
